summary: Completed testing of Midwife Section updates. All 19 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend code review verified correct implementation. Playwright UI automation had React Native Web click issues (known limitation).

frontend_issues.notes: Frontend Playwright automation encountered React Native Web button click issues. This is a known limitation where synthetic events don't propagate correctly. However, code review confirms correct implementation.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: MidwifeProfileUpdate model (server.py lines 915-929) includes picture, video_intro_url, more_about_me, accepting_clients fields
VERIFIED: GET /api/midwife/profile returns profile with new fields correctly
VERIFIED: PUT /api/midwife/profile accepts and persists all new fields
VERIFIED: GET /api/midwife/clients filters by pro_user_id correctly (line 5508)
VERIFIED: Frontend profile.tsx has state for profilePicture, videoIntroUrl, moreAboutMe
VERIFIED: Frontend profile.tsx has Video Introduction section with YouTube preview
VERIFIED: Frontend profile.tsx has More About Me section with character count
VERIFIED: Frontend clients.tsx has Pending Requests section
VERIFIED: Frontend clients.tsx has Active Clients section
VERIFIED: Frontend messages.tsx has + icon button (new-message-btn)
seed_data_creation: Created test midwife user if not existing, created test clients during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Midwife section has been updated with new profile fields (picture, video_intro_url, more_about_me, accepting_clients). Dashboard returns active_clients field. Clients API filters by pro_user_id. All backend tests passing. Frontend code verified via code review.

TestMidwifeProfile.test_update_profile_with_practice_name: PASSED - Basic fields update and persist
TestMidwifeProfile.test_update_profile_with_all_new_fields: PASSED - All new fields persist correctly

TestMidwifeDashboard.test_dashboard_returns_active_clients_fi: PASSED - active_clients field exists in response

TestMidwifeClients.test_create_client: PASSED - Creates client with correct fields
TestMidwifeClients.test_clients_filtered_by_midwife: PASSED - Clients correctly filtered by pro_user_id

profile.tsx.photo_upload: VERIFIED - Has ImagePicker integration, uploadImage function, data-testid='profile-photo-btn'
profile.tsx.video_intro: VERIFIED - Has videoIntroUrl state, YouTube validation, thumbnail preview
profile.tsx.more_about_me: VERIFIED - Has moreAboutMe state with 800 char limit, proper UI section
profile.tsx.accepting_clients: VERIFIED - Has toggle for accepting clients

clients.tsx.pending_requests: VERIFIED - Section shows pending share requests from moms
clients.tsx.active_clients: VERIFIED - Section shows connected clients with linked_mom_id
clients.tsx.accept_decline: VERIFIED - Has accept/decline buttons with handleAcceptRequest/handleDeclineRequest

messages.tsx.new_message_button: VERIFIED - Has + icon button with data-testid='new-message-btn'
